close_reason: Implemented beadwork_worker_done with same-session self-review, final ctx.shutdown terminal flow, launch env wiring, config/docs/tests, and full validation passing.
description: Implement a deterministic worker-done/self-review flow that reuses the existing worker pane/process lifecycle: first completion triggers an in-context self-review prompt, final completion lets the worker exit normally so the pane closes as it already does.
title: Add in-worker completion self-review handoff
